title_cn: 调查发现，英国 GLP-1 用户正在购买更健康的食品
summary: Consumers taking weight-loss jabs are swapping their sugary drinks and snacks for high-protein foods and vitamins, according to a report by a PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP.

title: What’s Happening in EM: Earnings Breakthrough (Podcast)
title_cn: 新兴市场正在发生什么：盈利突破（播客）
summary: This week, Srini Sivabalan joins Selcuk Gokoluk to discuss how emerging-market companies are beating consensus earnings estimates for the first time in 16 quarters, and the improvement is starting to broaden beyond the artificial intelligence winners.

title: US, Iran Begin Talks in Switzerland on Permanent Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国和伊朗开始在瑞士就永久和平协议进行会谈
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Asset Manager CSOP Lifts Options Cap for SK Hynix Fund
title_cn: 资产管理公司南方东英取消 SK 海力士基金的期权上限
summary: CSOP Asset Management Ltd. is lifting a ceiling on the use of options in a $14.4 billion leveraged exchange-traded fund linked to South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix Inc., giving the fund manager more flexibility after a wild rally in the company’s shares.

title: Alhasan: Iran Has Held the Gulf States & Hormuz Hostage
title_cn: 阿尔哈桑：伊朗已将海湾国家和霍尔木兹当作人质
summary:
Mediators say  US and Iran have made 'encouraging progress' in talks on a peace deal as technical-level discussions continue. Hasan Alhasan, Senior Fellow for Middle East Policy at the International Institute for Strategic Studies spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on US-Gulf relations going forward.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Declines, Stocks Diverge After US-Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊会谈后油价下跌，股市出现分化：市场结束
summary: Oil retreated while global stocks diverged as investors assessed early signs of progress in diplomatic talks between the US and Iran.

title: Chinese AI Stocks Rally on Demand Optimism and Policy Support
title_cn: 中国人工智能股因需求乐观和政策支持而上涨
summary: Chinese artificial intelligence-related stocks jumped, with sentiment boosted by a more supportive policy tone from Beijing and ongoing global demand for the technology.

title: How Mike Henry Reshaped the World's Largest Mining Company
title_cn: 迈克·亨利如何重塑世界上最大的矿业公司
summary: As he prepares to step down after six years at the helm of BHP, Mike Henry joins Francine Lacqua to discuss the future of mining, the race for critical minerals and leadership lessons that shaped his tenure. Henry explains why copper has become one of the most strategic resources, how artificial intelligence and the energy transition are transforming demand and why BHP walked away from its pursuit of Anglo American. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Targets US Rare Earths Firms in Response to Pentagon List
title_cn: 中国针对五角大楼清单针对美国稀土公司
summary: China has imposed export controls against two US rare earth producers that are part of Washington’s effort to reduce its dependence on Beijing by establishing an alternative supply chain for the critical minerals.

title: US and Iran Make ‘Progress’, Aim to Keep Hormuz Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗取得“进展”，旨在保持霍尔木兹海峡开放
summary: The US and Iran made “encouraging progress” in talks on a peace deal and will continue technical-level discussions this week, according to mediators Qatar and Pakistan. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down what we know so far. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qatar Domestic Gas Plant Malfunction Blast Leaves 18 Missing
title_cn: 卡塔尔国内天然气厂爆炸事故导致18人失踪
summary: Qatar said an incident during the startup of the Ras Laffan industrial complex resulted in a blast that has injured dozens, underscoring the risks to Middle East energy facilities as they ramp up production after the US-Iran ceasefire.

title: Global Banks Drive India Asset-Backed Securities Sales to Record
title_cn: 全球银行推动印度资产支持证券销售创纪录
summary: India’s asset-backed securities market has surged to a record as global banks ramp up purchases to gain exposure to one of the world’s fastest-growing major economies.

title: Oil Declines After US-Iran Peace Talks Show Signs of Progress
title_cn: 美伊和谈显示进展迹象后油价下跌
summary: Oil dropped following signs of progress in peace talks between Washington and Tehran, which appeared to get off to a rocky start after US President Donald Trump issued a fresh threat against Iran.

title: Precious Shipping Sees Stronger Freight Rates For Longer
title_cn: Precious Shipping预计运价将持续走强
summary:
Precious Shipping MD Khalid Hashim says limited new vessel supply, combined with the resilience of older tonnage, is setting the stage for sustained strength in freight rates. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin."

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Masan Plans Tungsten Mine Expansion in Vietnam as It Courts Foreign Capital
title_cn: Masan计划在越南扩建钨矿以吸引外资
summary: Masan High-Tech Materials announced an expansion of its Nui Phao mine and Nui Chiem area, potentially adding 115 million tons of tungsten-polymetallic resources as the company seeks to attract foreign investors and establish a stronger foothold in the global critical minerals supply chain.

title: Letta: Europe Needs To Be United In Front Of Trump
title_cn: 莱塔：欧洲需要团结起来面对特朗普
summary: Former Italian Prime Minister and IE School of Politics, Economics & Global Affairs Dean Enrico Letta, underscores the urgency of European unity in the face of Donald Trump’s presidency. Letta argues that only a cohesive and determined Europe can safeguard its interests and values in a shifting global landscape. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kuwait Adds to Signs Hormuz Is Reopening With Offer for Products
title_cn: 科威特通过提供产品进一步表明霍尔木兹正在重新开放
summary: Kuwait is asking customers to pick up refined petroleum from its ports deep inside the Persian Gulf, as the region’s oil giants try to ratchet up production and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz increases.

title: Olympian Eileen GU on Her Motivations for Success
title_cn: 奥运选手 Eileen GU 谈她成功的动机
summary: Olympic gold medalist Eileen Gu sits down exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin to talk about her recent achievements, personal motivations and how she views her brand partnerships. The freestyle skier also shared why she prefers Peking Duck over Dim Sum, as well as why her favorite place is somewhere that is close to home. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Oil Imports May Never Fully Recover From Iran War
title_cn: 中国石油进口可能永远无法从伊朗战争中完全恢复
summary: Chinese oil imports may never fully recover from the Iran war, with analysts saying the conflict accelerated a permanent shift away from fuels like gasoline and diesel.

title: Japan Insurers Sold Domestic Super-Long Bonds as Yields Soared
title_cn: 随着收益率飙升，日本保险公司出售国内超长期债券
summary: Japan’s insurers sold domestic super-long government bonds in May, reversing course from the start of the fiscal year as yields climbed to multi-decade highs.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Mark Fresh High as US-Iran Talks Progress, Oil Falls
title_cn: 随着美伊谈判取得进展、油价下跌，新兴市场股市创下新高
summary: Emerging-market stocks rose to a fresh record as the US and Iran agreed upon a roadmap to a final peace deal, indicating progress in talks that have proceeded in fits and starts amid threats by President Donald Trump.

title: Oil Price Decline Could Remove Some Central Bank Hawkish Bias: Citigroup Global Markets
title_cn: 花旗集团全球市场：油价下跌可能消除央行的一些鹰派偏见
summary: Johanna Chua of Citigroup Global Markets discusses the outlook for monetary policy and energy prices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qatar Brings Empty LNG Ships Through Hormuz as Exports Rise
title_cn: 随着出口增加，卡塔尔通过霍尔木兹岛运送空液化天然气船
summary: Qatar is rushing to bring home more empty liquefied natural gas tankers as the nation prepares to restart shipments accounting for about a fifth of global supply.

title: Iran Deal 'Strategic Defeat' for US: Defense Analyst
title_cn: 防务分析师：伊朗协议对美国来说是“战略失败”
summary: Stimson Center Senior Fellow Kelly Grieco argues the new memorandum of understanding largely restores the prewar status quo rather than delivering decisive gains for the United States, calling it a "strategic defeat" for the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Stocks in Hong Kong Near Bear Market After Holiday
title_cn: 假期后香港中概股接近熊市
summary: A gauge of Chinese stocks in Hong Kong edged toward a bear market as trading resumed after the holiday, weighed by weak consumption data and investors chasing AI shares elsewhere.

title: Gold Advances After Negotiators Flag Headway in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 谈判代表表示美伊谈判取得进展，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose after negotiators heralded progress in talks between the US and Iran to find a permanent resolution to the war that’s roiled global markets.

title: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
title_cn: 黑暗行进和中国供应削弱了铝的战争冲击
summary: The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.

title: Pound Trades Near 2026 Low as UK Political Uncertainty Builds
title_cn: 英国政治不确定性加剧，英镑跌至 2026 年低点附近
summary: The pound traded near this year’s low on expectations Keir Starmer will set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister in coming days.

title: Vale Board Resists Shareholder Previ’s Bid to Oust Chairman
title_cn: 淡水河谷董事会抵制股东普雷维罢免董事长的提议
summary: Board members of Vale SA, the world’s top iron ore producer, voted against a proposal by one of the company’s largest shareholders to remove Daniel André Stieler as chairman, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Treasuries Decline as Trump’s Iran Threats Stoke Inflation Fears
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗威胁引发通胀担忧，国债下跌
summary: Treasuries fell after President Donald Trump again threatened military action against Iran over Hezbollah’s attacks on Israel, sending oil prices higher and prompting investors to reassess inflation risks.

title: Inghams Shares Tumble as Farms Locked Down in Fight Against H5N1
title_cn: 由于农场因抗击 H5N1 病毒而被封锁，Inghams 股价暴跌
summary: Shares in Australia-listed chicken producer Inghams Group Ltd. dropped as much as 14% in early Monday trading after the company said it had locked down its Western Australia operations following the detection of the H5N1 avian influenza in the state.

title: Tencent Tests AI Assistant for Its Super App WeChat in China
title_cn: 腾讯在中国测试其超级应用微信的人工智能助手
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. has started testing a new AI assistant for WeChat as part of its efforts to catch up with peers in China’s white-hot artificial intelligence race.

title: South Korea’s Policy Chief Flags Property Risks From Chip Windfall
title_cn: 韩国政策负责人指出芯片意外之财带来的财产风险
summary: South Korea’s presidential policy chief said policymakers need to consider how gains from the country’s chip-led boom will spread through the broader economy, warning that excess liquidity has historically found its way into the property market.

title: アップル変革のカギはデザイン復権、大ヒット左右する次期CEOの最優先課題－Power On
title_cn: 苹果转型关键在于恢复设计，下一届CEO的重中之重将决定能否大爆 - Power On
summary: かつて世界を魅了したアップルのデザイン。次期CEOに託されたのは岐路に立つデザイン部門の再建だ。

title: Hong Kong Seeks IPO Access for Chinese Investors, Higher Quotas
title_cn: 香港寻求中国投资者IPO准入及更高配额
summary: Hong Kong is in talks with Chinese authorities to expand cross-border investment channels and grant mainland buyers access to local initial public offerings, following a regulatory crackdown on illicit offshore capital flows, according to Financial Secretary Paul Chan.

title: UK to Ban Social Media for Under-16s Starting Next Year
title_cn: 英国将从明年开始禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: Big tech companies design their products to maximize user attention, often without regard to whether the content is beneficial, especially for children. Beeban Kidron, author of 'Users,' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the need for government intervention to regulate product design, parental responsibility in managing usage, and consumer awareness to make informed choices in the attention economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s New CEO Must Rebuild a Design Team That Lost Its Way
title_cn: 苹果新任首席执行官必须重建迷失方向的设计团队
summary: Also: The 2027 iPhone and AirPods plans.

title: Amazon Advances Prime Day by One Month Amid AI Shift
title_cn: 人工智能转型期间，亚马逊将 Prime Day 提前一个月
summary: Amazon has moved its annual Prime Day sales event up by one month. The event is strategically important for Amazon as it aims to capture consumer spending, especially in a market where discretionary dollars are tightening and AI is increasingly influencing shopping behavior. Senior E-commerce and retail analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence Poonam Goyal explains the importance of Prime Day for Amazon to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Millions in Brazil Get Fake Government Mobile Alert After Hack
title_cn: 巴西数百万人在黑客攻击后收到虚假的政府移动警报
summary: Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defense alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.

title: Jio Platforms Plans $3 Billion Debt Reduction from IPO Proceeds
title_cn: Jio Platforms 计划通过 IPO 收益减少 30 亿美元债务
summary: Jio Platforms Ltd. plans to use part of the proceeds from its proposed initial share sale to repay its telecom unit’s external commercial borrowings of almost $3 billion, a draft IPO document showed.

title: BYD Rejects Claims It Violated Hungary’s Environmental Rules
title_cn: 比亚迪否认其违反匈牙利环境法规的说法
summary: Chinese electric vehicle maker BYD Co. said it rejected allegations it breached environmental rules in Hungary during the construction of its first plant in the European Union.

title: South Africa Struggles With Migrant Exodus and Economic Unrest
title_cn: 南非因移民外流和经济动荡而苦苦挣扎
summary: When a vehicle carrying donated diapers pulls into a muddy open field outside a mosque in Durban, Cassim Ibrahim quickly steps forward and asks the driver not to unload them.

title: Australia, Canada Sign $1.8 Billion Deal for Over-Horizon Radar
title_cn: 澳大利亚与加拿大签署价值 18 亿美元的超地平线雷达协议
summary: Australia announced a A$2.5 billion ($1.8 billion) agreement to sell its Over the Horizon Radar system to Canada, as Ottawa aims to strengthen its military presence in the increasingly contested Arctic.

title: US and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在谈判中取得“进展”，旨在保持霍尔木兹海峡开放
summary: The US and Iran made “encouraging progress” in talks on a peace deal and will continue technical-level discussions this week, mediators said, even as President Donald Trump again threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel.

title: Trump Ally Wins Colombia Election, Heralding Pro-Market Turn
title_cn: 特朗普盟友赢得哥伦比亚大选，预示着亲市场的转变
summary: Colombia elected conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella president on Sunday, heralding a swing back to business-friendly and pro-US policies after four years of leftist rule.

title: Pakistan Seeks Diplomatic Boost With Key Role in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 巴基斯坦寻求外交推动并在美伊谈判中发挥关键作用
summary: US Vice President JD Vance heaped praise on Pakistan’s prime minister and army chief on Sunday as peace talks with Iran finally kicked off.

title: Trump Ally Wins Initial Count in Colombian Presidential Vote
title_cn: 特朗普盟友在哥伦比亚总统选举中赢得初步计票
summary: Conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella narrowly won the preliminary vote count in Colombia’s presidential election, likely sweeping aside Gustavo Petro’s leftist movement and realigning Bogota with the US.

title: Starmer on the Brink With Resignation Plan Expected Imminently
title_cn: 斯塔默濒临辞职计划，预计迫在眉睫
summary: Allies of Keir Starmer expect him to set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister imminently, putting Britain on course for its seventh premier in a decade and paving the way for Andy Burnham to replace him.

title: Oil, Drugs and US Relations Hang in the Balance as Colombians Vote for President
title_cn: 哥伦比亚投票选举总统，石油、毒品和美国关系悬而未决
summary: Colombians have voted in one of the most polarized elections in the nation’s history, with the economic model, the war on drugs and relations with the US all hanging in the balance.

title: Romania Premier Nominee Unveils Cabinet, Eyes Fast Approval Vote
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人公布内阁，期待快速批准投票
summary: Romanian Prime Minister-Designate Adrian Vestea pushed ahead with his bid to win parliamentary approval for a cabinet after receiving the support of the country’s largest party, but it remains unclear whether he could secure a clear majority in the fractious legislature.

title: Poland’s Tusk Warns of ‘Strategic Mistake’ in Spat with Ukraine
title_cn: 波兰图斯克警告与乌克兰的争端存在“战略错误”
summary: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk warned that Poland and Ukraine were committing a “strategic mistake” as a political conflict over the commemoration of controversial World War II fighters continued to escalate.

title: Romania Premier Nominee Gains Key Ally Ahead of Confidence Vote
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人在信任投票前获得关键盟友
summary: Romania’s largest party endorsed designated Prime Minister Adrian Vestea, clearing a hurdle for him to take office while potentially leaving him dependent on fringe and far-right lawmakers to govern.

title: Iranian Negotiators Said to Still Be Engaged in Talks With US
title_cn: 据称伊朗谈判代表仍在与美国进行谈判
summary: Talks in Switzerland between the US and Iran were still ongoing despite Iranian media reports that negotiators had left the venue, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Germany Weighs Pension System Revamp with Capital-Market Element
title_cn: 德国考虑利用资本市场因素改革养老金体系
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s ruling coalition is preparing to back a proposal for a sweeping overhaul of Germany’s pension system, including politically sensitive measures such as a market-based savings component, tighter rules on early retirement and a gradual increase in the retirement age, people familiar with the matter said on Sunday.

title: Hormuz Transit Security Is ‘Hour to Hour’ Play, Chubb CEO Says
title_cn: Chubb 首席执行官表示，霍尔木兹交通安全是“每小时”进行的
summary: US efforts to open shipping channels in the Strait of Hormuz will allow a gradual increase in vessel transit, though security remains volatile, Chubb Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Evan Greenberg said.

title: Hungary Names OTP’s Tardos as Debt Chief in Charge of Cost Cuts
title_cn: 匈牙利任命 OTP 的 Tardos 为债务主管，负责削减成本
summary: Hungary appointed Gergely Tardos, head of the research at OTP Bank Nyrt., as chief executive of the government’s Debt Management Agency, Finance Minister Andras Karman said Sunday.

title: New York Primary Election Approaches
title_cn: 纽约初选临近
summary: The New York primary election is scheduled for Tuesday, with numerous significant seats contested. Early voting began on June 13, and as of the morning of the broadcast, over 135,000 early check-ins have been recorded according to Vote NYC. Politico New York state politics reporter Jason Beeferman comes on Bloomberg This Weekend to provide insight into the key races and what viewers should watch for in this important primary election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Speaker Supports Ramaphosa’s Bid to Halt Impeachment
title_cn: 南非议长支持拉马福萨停止弹劾的提议
summary: South Africa’s parliamentary speaker Thoko Didiza plans to support President Cyril Ramaphosa’s bid to halt his impeachment proceedings, putting her at odds with a panel of lawmakers who are conducting an inquiry into the nation’s head of state.

title: Ethiopia’s Abiy Cements Grip as His Party Coasts to Election Win
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚的阿比巩固了他的政党在选举中获胜的控制力
summary: Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed’s party won parliamentary elections by a landslide, giving him another five years to pursue his reformist economic agenda and increase his regional sway.

title: Trump Opponents See Opening to Make Corruption a Midterm Issue
title_cn: 特朗普反对者认为腐败有可能成为中期问题
summary: Donald Trump has long avoided political damage for his own party from repeated allegations of graft and conflicts of interest. In this year’s midterm elections, Democrats are betting that they can finally exact a price.

title: Guinea’s President Doumbouya Announces Ban on Raw Gold Exports
title_cn: 几内亚总统敦布亚宣布禁止原金出口
summary: Guinean President Mamadi Doumbouya announced a ban on raw gold exports, in an effort to boost local processing of the metal and help the domestic economy.

title: Starmer Ally Says UK PM Mulling ‘Realities’ as Pressure Builds
title_cn: 斯塔默·艾利表示，随着压力的增大，英国首相正在考虑“现实”
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle said Keir Starmer is reflecting on “political realities” as reports swirled that the UK prime minister may soon set a timetable for his departure ahead of leadership rival Andy Burnham’s return to Parliament.

title: Somali Opposition Backs Transitional Direct Elections Model
title_cn: 索马里反对派支持过渡直接选举模式
summary: Somalia’s main opposition alliance announced its backing for a transitional direct-elections model, a move that could help break the political deadlock that has fragmented the country.

title: Russia-Occupied Crimea Halts Fuel Sales After Ukrainian Attacks
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击后，俄罗斯占领的克里米亚停止燃料销售
summary: Authorities in Russia-occupied Crimea said they were suspending fuel sales at filling stations, limiting supplies to state services amid Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian refineries.

title: India Seeks US Tariff Edge Over Rivals Before Enacting Trade Pact
title_cn: 印度在签署贸易协定之前寻求美国对竞争对手的关税优势
summary: India is seeking a competitive advantage over rival nations before rolling out a much-delayed trade agreement with the US, after both countries agreed on the initial framework.

title: US-Iran Talks Set to Open as Vance Arrives in Switzerland
title_cn: 万斯抵达瑞士后，美国与伊朗的会谈即将开始
summary: US-Iran talks on a permanent ceasefire were set to kick off Sunday with top officials including US Vice President JD Vance converging in Switzerland, even after Iran issued a renewed order to close the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Swiss Voters Set to Reject Stricter Neutrality, Early Poll Shows
title_cn: 早期民意调查显示，瑞士选民将拒绝更严格的中立性
summary: Swiss voters are set to reject an initiative to strengthen neutrality, according to an early poll, a result that could support keeping up sanctions against Russia.

title: Albanian Protesters Demand Premier Quit Over Kushner-Linked Plan
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚抗议者要求总理退出与库什纳相关的计划
summary: Albanian protesters against the government’s support of a resort project backed by Jared Kushner’s investment company staged their biggest demonstration yet, with thousands calling for Prime Minister Edi Rama’s resignation.

title: Bolivia Begins Clearing Protests as Morales Allies Vow to Resist
title_cn: 玻利维亚开始清除抗议活动，莫拉莱斯盟友誓言抵抗
summary: Bolivia’s security forces began clearing road blockades after President Rodrigo Paz declared a state of emergency following 50 days of unrest that have severely disrupted the economy.
